name: Peanut Sauce (Nuoc Leo)
recipeInstructions:
This peanut sauce differs from a traditional Thai peanut sauce, as it is less sweet and does not contain coconut milk. It is commonly served alongside Nuoc Cham and Carrot salad with Cha Gio dishes.
Prepare the roasted peanuts and set aside. [I use unsalted Planter's roasted peanuts.]
Heat the oil in a small saucepan until hot. Add the garlic, chili paste, and tomato paste, frying for about 30 seconds or until the garlic is golden brown. Add the broth, sugar, peanut butter, and hoisin sauce, then whisk to dissolve the peanut butter. Bring to a boil and reduce heat, simmering for 3 minutes.
Divide the sauce into individual dipping bowls and garnish with ground peanuts and sliced chile. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Yield: about 1 cup.
